description: Landing page for ClawCon Bogota — a tabletop gaming convention in Bogota, Colombia. Bold, vibrant, Latin American festival energy with a gamer aesthetic.

features.name: hero_section
features.title: Hero Section
features.description: Full-viewport hero with event name (ClawCon Bogota), tagline, date (e.g. August 2026), location (Bogota, Colombia), and a primary CTA button (Register Now).
acceptance: Renders event name as the main heading
CTA button is accessible and keyboard-navigable
Uses design tokens for all colors and spacing

features.name: about_section
features.title: About Section
features.description: Section describing what ClawCon Bogota is — a tabletop gaming convention celebrating board games, card games, RPGs, and miniature gaming in Colombia. Includes a short paragraph and key facts (e.g. attendee count, venue, year).
acceptance: Renders a descriptive paragraph about the event
Displays key stats (e.g. expected attendees, event duration, venue)

features.name: schedule_section
features.title: Schedule / Activities Section
features.description: Section listing the event schedule or main activities (e.g. Open Gaming, Tournaments, Panels, Cosplay Contest). Uses a card or list layout per day/track.
acceptance: Each item has a title, time/day, and short description

features.name: speakers_guests_section
features.title: Guests / Featured Games Section
features.description: Section showcasing featured guests, game designers, or highlighted games at the event. Card-based layout with name/title and a placeholder avatar.
acceptance: Renders at least 3 guest or featured-game cards
Each card has name, role/description, and an avatar placeholder

features.name: registration_cta_section
features.title: Registration / CTA Section
features.description: Dedicated section prompting visitors to register or buy tickets. Includes a headline, short supporting text, and a prominent CTA button.
acceptance: Contains a clear headline and supporting copy
CTA button links to an anchor or placeholder URL
Visually distinct from other sections (contrast background)

features.name: footer_section
features.title: Footer
features.description: Footer with event logo/name, social media links (placeholder hrefs), contact email, and copyright notice.
acceptance: Contains social media link placeholders (accessible labels)

features.name: navigation
features.title: Navigation Bar
features.description: Responsive top navigation bar with the ClawCon Bogota logo/name and anchor links to each section. Collapses to a hamburger menu on mobile.
acceptance: Smooth-scrolls to each section on click
Collapses to a hamburger/toggle on mobile

features.name: Deploy to Vercel
features.verification: vercel --prod returns a live https:// URL; URL reported to user
